title: Miami MFA emails (House 2026; selected via Grok)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

Emails sent to or from* any of the officials (and/or their staffers) listed below and any email address ending with mfa.gov.il or gov.il:

•  Daniel Perez
•  Tyler Sirois 
•  Chuck Brannan
•  Hillary Cassel
•  Yvette Benarroch
•  Mike Caruso
•  Peggy Gossett-Seidman
•  Chip LaMarca
•  Michelle Salzman
•  Debra Tendrich
•  Mitch Rosenwald
•  Kelly Skidmore
•  Allison Tant
•  Katherine Waldron
•  Jeff Holcomb
•  Michael Gottlieb
•  Jennifer Canady
•  Vicki Lopez
•  Robbie Brackett
•  Tiffany Esposito

* By "sent to," I also mean emails CC'd or BCC'd to the people named.

You may limit the search to the dates between 1 January 2026 and the date this request is processed.

If any emails contain attachments, please include those attachments as well. If some portions of the requested records are properly exempt from disclosure, please disclose any reasonably segregable non-exempt portions of the requested records.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Matthew Petti
